items.title: Humphries 'playing best darts of career' with PL title defence in sights
items.summary: Luke Humphries believes he is heading into Finals Night playing the "best darts of his career" as he looks to defend his crown as Premier League champion.

items.summary: The summer of 2025 saw a huge increase in transfers between Premier League clubs. Here are some players who could move for big money but will stay in England.
